title: Return of Organization Exempt From Income Tax (990 series)
disclaimer: Self-help document service — NOT legal or tax advice. Which 990 variant applies and how to complete it depend on the organization's facts; verify with the IRS and consult a licensed professional. You file with the IRS yourself.

fields.name: organization_name
fields.label: Organization legal name
fields.help: Exact legal name of the exempt organization.

fields.name: ein
fields.label: EIN
fields.help: The organization's EIN. Supplied transiently to complete the return.

fields.name: tax_year
fields.label: Tax year covered
fields.help: The accounting period the return covers (calendar or fiscal).

fields.name: variant
fields.label: 990 variant
fields.help: Neutral list — the USER selects the variant their organization is required to file. Eligibility depends on gross receipts/assets/type; see IRS instructions. The tool does not decide this for you.

fields.name: gross_receipts
fields.label: Gross receipts
fields.help: Used by the user to determine which variant applies.

fields.name: total_assets
fields.label: Total assets (end of year)
fields.help: Used by the user to determine which variant applies.

fields.name: mission_statement
fields.label: Mission / program description
fields.help: Brief statement of the organization's exempt purpose and programs.

fields.name: principal_officer
fields.label: Principal officer name
fields.help: Name of the principal officer / contact.
